source.platform: Home Team Luxury Rentals (Guesty booking engine)

property.name: Award-winning Private Beach & Breathtaking Sunsets
property.tagline: Direct beachfront luxury on North Clearwater Beach

highlights: Direct, private beachfront — not beach access — with a residents-only path to your own stretch of sand
Over 90 ft of exclusive Gulf frontage with sweeping 180° views and nightly sunsets
Heated private pool with pool volleyball & basketball
Putting green, ping pong, Connect 4 & board games
Fully renovated top-to-bottom: new tile, fixtures, baths, appliances, coastal furnishings
Screened patio with outdoor dining, BBQ grill, and string-lit ceilings
Gated, upscale Carlouel community — 1.5 miles from the pier, restaurants & attractions
Family/kid friendly, dedicated workspace, washer & dryer, fully stocked kitchen
